ol.li: Click New to add a size. In Name, type just a number (e.g. 6) — it becomes “6 inch” and the width is filled for you.
Key auto-fills from the name; leave it — don't change it once the size is in use.
Width (mm) — paper width. 1 inch ≈ 25.4 mm (3 inch ≈ 76 mm, 4 inch ≈ 100 mm). Adjust if needed.
Height (mm) — 0 = continuous roll (auto height); a number pins a fixed page height.
Sizes here feed the Default Receipt Size in Invoice Settings and the print-time size picker.

t.span: Full guide: Invoice Settings ▸ User Manual.

ol.li: There is one layout per paper size. Open a row, then click Open Visual Editor to design it.
In the editor, click a section (Logo, Company Header, Title, Items, Totals, Footer…) to edit it on the right.
Use List mode (recommended) — it stacks sections and prints exactly like the editor, growing with content.
Edit the Title and Grand Total labels (English + Arabic), drag to reorder, set width/alignment, hide/show.
Changes auto-save; the Live Preview is exactly what prints. To use a layout, pick Custom Layout (editable) in Invoice Settings.

t.span: Full guide: Invoice Settings ▸ User Manual.
